reviews.comment:
Lugar que suele tener solo nafta super. Medios de pago efectivo, casi nunca funciona otro medio. Si estás de paso conviene asegurarse y llegar YPF Ituzaingo.

(Translated by Google)
This station usually only has premium gasoline. Cash is the only payment method; other methods are rarely accepted. If you're passing through, it's worth making sure you stop at YPF Ituzaingó.
